overall.description: Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting first-person exploration of a dusty futuristic urban plaza surrounding the 'Afterlife' nightclub. The camera moves from bright open desert-sunlit streets into shadowed underpasses, encountering armored characters and NPCs amid post-apocalyptic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert plaza in front of nightclub

events.description: large military truck passes close to camera on the left, temporarily blocking view
camera slows while approaching the building entrance and guard

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dusty plaza toward the cylindrical building entrance

notable_agents.action: guard standing near the building entrance watching the approach

entered.detail: large cylindrical structure with 'Deck' neon signage and red metal facade
armored green truck with covered cargo bed
tall palm trees against the blue sky
rocky desert hills with scattered structures

segments.scene_description: The clip opens in a bright, dusty plaza with a large cylindrical nightclub building ahead. A military truck passes by on the left as the camera approaches the entrance where a guard stands watch. Palm trees and distant mountains frame the scene under harsh midday sun.

events.description: heavily armored character with orange shield backpack enters view and moves along the building
camera turns right to follow the curved building facade and underpass entrance

agents.ego_description: circling around the building exterior, observing the armored character

notable_agents.action: heavily armored character with orange shield pacing along the building wall

entered.detail: large spherical metal framework structure on the hillside
round building with yellow signage visible in distance

segments.scene_description: Moving around the building's curve, the camera encounters a heavily armored character with an orange backpack. The plaza opens to reveal distant futuristic structures including a geodesic dome. The ground transitions to reddish tiles as the camera approaches a shadowed underpass.

events.description: entering deep shadow under the building overpass, sunlight fades significantly
transitioning from open exterior to enclosed underpass walkway

agents.ego_description: moving into the shadowed underpass beneath the building complex

entered.detail: concrete overpass structure creating deep shadow overhead
scattered rubble and abandoned materials along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dimly lit underpass as the bright exterior fades into shadow. The concrete ceiling blocks most sunlight, creating a stark contrast with the previous plaza. Debris and rubble line the path as the environment becomes increasingly enclosed.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow underpass corridor with graffiti walls

events.description: encountering two NPCs standing against the wall in the underpass shadows
slowing down while passing the NPCs, then continuing forward through debris

agents.ego_description: cautiously moving through the dim underpass, observing the NPCs and surroundings

notable_agents.action: two women standing against the wall, one in pink pants using a device, one in minimal clothing with purple hair

entered.detail: walls covered in colorful graffiti and street art tags
smoking destroyed vehicle with blue body in the underpass
simple concrete seating along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: Deep in the underpass, the camera passes two women standing against the wall amidst graffiti-covered concrete. A burning vehicle wreck smokes in the center of the path. The environment is dimly lit with artificial light sources, creating a gritty, enclosed atmosphere as the camera continues through the debris.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, sun-drenched urban plaza into the gritty, shadowed depths of a concrete underpass. It begins in a dusty open area under a harsh midday sun, passing a military truck and a guarded entrance to a cylindrical nightclub framed by distant mountains and palm trees. As the camera curves around the building, the terrain shifts to reddish tiles and reveals a distant geodesic dome before moving toward a darkening architectural void. The scene then transitions abruptly from the blinding exterior light into a dimly lit underpass, where the open sky is replaced by a heavy concrete ceiling and scattered rubble. Finally, the environment becomes fully enclosed and atmospheric, passing graffiti-covered walls and two standing figures to reach a smoking vehicle wreck illuminated by artificial light.
